member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Web.Controllers.Api.CatalogModuleListEntryController.CreateLinks(VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink[])
member.summary: Creates links for categories or items to parent categories and catalogs.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Web.Controllers.Api.CatalogModuleListEntryController.BulkCreateLinks(VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Web.Model.BulkLinkCreationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates category links in bulk for catalog entries based on the specified search criteria.
member.param: The request containing the target catalog, category, and search criteria for the entries to link.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: An indicating the result of the operation. Returns if the catalog identifier is not specified, if the user lacks the required permissions, or upon successful completion.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Web.Controllers.Api.CatalogModuleListEntryController.DeleteLinks(VirtoCommerce.CatalogModule.Core.Model.CategoryLink[])
member.summary: Unlinks the linked categories or items from parent categories and catalogs.

member.summary: Move categories or products to another location.

member.summary: Bulk delete by the search criteria.
